ratings.comment: Prof. Best is amazing! She is so talkative and considerate to her students. We never had lecture, she would just discuss with us during section. She knows her material very well, so she can give clear and respectful feedback. She doesn't make you feel terrible when she grades a paper. My course was online, so I'm sure she is better in person. :)
Nice instructions and useful feedbacks. I recommend her!
She's the best ESL instructor. I highly recommend her!
She is a great esl teacher.
She was very helpful and wanted her students to succeed and understand the material. I enjoyed having her as my instructor! She is the best!
Really good Prof, highly recommend her.
A good teacher for ESL. It is not an easy A, but grading is fair.
She's really helpful, and extremely welcome to offer help as long as you ask for it. Beware of ESL118, it's a lot of work. PS: Get ready to READ.
